subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and thy anguish and lamentation at separation became apparent. This plaintive cry [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما وصول یافت و جزع و فزع از فراق معلوم گردید این ناله
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
